response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the video content to identify audio and visual elements. 2. Determined the video consists of a VTuber cooking curry and providing spoken commentary. 3. Analyzed the audio track throughout the entire duration and confirmed there is no vocal music present. 4. Created a single scene covering the entire duration of the video (00:00.000 to 04:55.000) with 'contains_vocal_music' set to false.
response.global_summary: A video showing a VTuber cooking spice curry while providing commentary to her audience. No music is present.

scenes.description: The VTuber is cooking a spice curry while talking to her audience. The left side of the screen shows a top-down view of the pan, and the right side shows the VTuber. There is no vocal music throughout this segment.
